node.description: Onboard clock status register
clk_wiz_0 locked - drives AXI4-Lite and front-end processing logic
clk_wiz_1 locked - drives Aurora init clock
clk_wiz_2 locked - drives the 100GbE readout clock
Aurora PLL locked - from MGT Quads on left-hand side of the FPGA driving lower halves of QSFP-DD modules
Aurora PLL locked - from MGT Quads on right-hand side of the FPGA driving upper halves of QSFP-DD modules
CMAC PLL locked - from MGT Quad left-hand side of the FPGA driving lower half of QSFP2-DD module
CMAC PLL locked - from MGT Quad right-hand side of the FPGA driving upper half of QSFP2-DD module
CMAC PLL locked - from MGT Quad right-hand side of the FPGA driving upper half of QSFP3-DD module
QSFP-DD status register
QSFP-DD0 module present (active-high)
QSFP-DD1 module present (active-high)
QSFP-DD2 module present (active-high)
QSFP-DD3 module present (active-high)
QSFP-DD0 CDR disabled via i2c (active-high)
QSFP-DD1 CDR disabled via i2c (active-high)
QSFP-DD2 CDR disabled via i2c (active-high)
QSFP-DD3 lower CDR disabled via i2c (active-high)
CMAC status register
CMAC 0 100GbE Rx aligned, used to indicate lane up
CMAC 1 100GbE Rx aligned, used to indicate lane up
CMAC 2 100GbE Rx aligned, used to indicate lane up
CMAC 0 100GbE Rx aligned error
CMAC 1 100GbE Rx aligned error
CMAC 2 100GbE Rx aligned error
CMAC 0 100GbE Rx high Bit-Error Rate
CMAC 1 100GbE Rx high Bit-Error Rate
CMAC 2 100GbE Rx high Bit-Error Rate
Aurora lane up
Aurora channel up
Aurora soft error flags
Aurora hard error flags
Aurora Rx polarity flags
Active-high resets for each of the clock domains in the design
Active-high reset for the built-in Hexitec-MHz strip generator(s)
Active-high reset for the dath processing and readout path
Active-high reset for the Aurora channels
Active-high reset for the 100GbE Ethernet 0 MAC
Active-high reset for the 100GbE Ethernet 1 MAC
Active-high reset for the 100GbE Ethernet 2 MAC
Active-high reset for the SI5328 0 Programmable Frequency Synthesiser
Active-high reset for the SI5328 1 Programmable Frequency Synthesiser
Active-high reset for the AXI4-Lite bus
Active-high global reset (by resetting the CCMC/PLLs)
Reset event control register
Disable reset generation when any of the Aurora lanes go down
Disable reset generation when 100GbE Ethernet 0 is down
Disable reset generation when 100GbE Ethernet 1 is down
Disable reset generation when 100GbE Ethernet 2 is down
Disable reset generation when QSFP-DD 0 module is inserted
Disable reset generation when QSFP-DD 1 module is inserted
Disable reset generation when QSFP-DD 2 module is inserted
Disable reset generation when QSFP-DD 3 module is inserted
Source code version in hex readable form [major].[minor].[micro]
3 digit hex readable micro
3 digit hex readable minor
2 digit hex readable major
Abbreviated Git hash for commit where bit-stream was compiled (padded to 32bit)
Build date in hex readable form [year]-[month]-[day]
2 digit hex readable day
2 digit hex readable month
4 digit hex readable year
Build time in hex readable form [hour]:[minute]:[seconds]
2 digit hex readable seconds
2 digit hex readable minute
2 digit hex readable hour
Unique FPGA device DNA ID [31..0]
Unique FPGA device DNA ID [63..32]
Unique FPGA device DNA ID [95..64]
Unique FPGA device DNA ID Reserved for future expansion [127..96]
DNA status register
FPGA DNA valid
Scratch register 1 to test register read writes with no impact to design functionality
Scratch register 2 to test register read writes with no impact to design functionality
Scratch register 3 to test register read writes with no impact to design functionality
Scratch register 4 to test register read writes with no impact to design functionality
